blocks.content: Julian was back at his rental by one in the afternoon.
He made coffee. Sat at the study table. Added what Davenport had told him — and more importantly, what Davenport hadn't.

The call records surprised him. Something he wasn't expecting. Which means whoever Marcus was arguing with at nine seventeen wasn't a client, wasn't a stranger. Was someone close enough to surprise a thirty-year veteran.
His phone buzzed. Mara.

blocks.speaker: Mara
blocks.content: Tell me you've slept.

blocks.speaker: Julian
blocks.content: I gave my formal statement this morning.

blocks.speaker: Mara
blocks.content: That's not what I asked.

blocks.speaker: Julian
blocks.content: Three hours. It was enough.

blocks.speaker: Mara
blocks.content: It was not enough. Julian—

blocks.speaker: Julian
blocks.content: The inspector is sharper than he looks. He's holding something on the call records.
A pause. He heard her exhale — the specific exhale that meant she was deciding whether to push.

blocks.speaker: Mara
blocks.content: You're not going to let this go.

blocks.speaker: Julian
blocks.content: No.

blocks.speaker: Mara
blocks.content: Someone planned this carefully. Months of it.

blocks.speaker: Julian
blocks.content: Years.

blocks.speaker: Mara
blocks.content: And you're the only one who sees it.

blocks.speaker: Julian
blocks.content: The inspector's close. He just needs someone to point the direction.
Another pause. Longer.

blocks.speaker: Mara
blocks.content: Wednesday's meetings are rescheduled. Thompson wasn't happy.

blocks.speaker: Julian
blocks.content: Thompson's never happy.

blocks.speaker: Mara
blocks.content: That's true.
She went quiet for a moment. He didn't fill it. With most people he filled silences — habit, strategy, the discomfort of being still. With Mara he never felt the need.

blocks.speaker: Mara
blocks.content: Be careful. And I mean that in a way that actually means something — not the thing you say when you're already halfway out the door.

blocks.speaker: Julian
blocks.content: Mara.

blocks.speaker: Mara
blocks.content: I know. Go solve it.
She hung up. He held the phone a moment longer than necessary. Then he set it down and looked at the legal pad.
